headline: VastAdvisor Launches Native CRM Integrations with Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics, and HubSpot
summary: VastAdvisor, the AI-powered organic growth engine built for wealth management advisors, today announced its native integrations with three leading CRMs – Salesforce Financial Services Cloud, Microsoft Dynamics 365, and HubSpot. These connectors remove the data friction that has forced advisory teams to work across disconnected systems, and thanks to these integrations deliver VastAdvisor's growth intelligence directly inside the CRM environments firms already operate in.

content.title: VastAdvisor Launches Native CRM Integrations with Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics, and HubSpot
content.summary: VastAdvisor, the AI-powered organic growth engine built for wealth management advisors, today announced its native integrations with three leading CRMs – Salesforce Financial Services Cloud, Microsoft Dynamics 365, and HubSpot. These connectors remove the data friction that has forced advisory teams to work across disconnected systems, and thanks to these integrations deliver VastAdvisor's growth intelligence directly inside the CRM environments firms already operate in.

headline: After a 50% Drop, Is ServiceNow Stock Worth Buying?
summary: Less than a year ago, ServiceNow stock (NYSE: NOW) was a market darling trading at over $211 a share. Today, it’s hovering around $102. That’s a massive 50% haircut from its peak, even though the actual business hasn’t missed a beat—growing revenues at 20% year after year.
